title: Hiranagar Fort
tagline: Hiranagar Fort — heritage city of Jammu & Kashmir

overview.short: The Hiranagar Fort, also known as Jasmergarh Fort is a historic fort located in the town of Hiranagar in the Kathua district of Jammu and Kashmir, India.
overview.description: The Hiranagar Fort, also known as Jasmergarh Fort is a historic fort located in the town of Hiranagar in the Kathua district of Jammu and Kashmir, India. Built in the mid-19th century by Raja Hira Singh, the fort served as an administrative and military center for the region during the Dogra rule. Positioned on a slight elevation, the fort overlooks the surrounding plains and houses remnants of royal architecture, including a palace and prison complex.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

topPlaces.name: Hiranagar
topPlaces.description: Hiranagar is a town and a notified area committee, near Kathua city in Kathua district in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is a tehsil headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Chak Dayala
topPlaces.description: Chack Diyalla or Chakdyala is a village in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is located in Hiranagar tehsil of Kathua district.

topPlaces.name: Ghagwal
topPlaces.description: Ghagwal is a town and Panchayat in Samba district in the Jammu division of the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. The town is located 15 kilometres from district headquarters Samba.

items.note: Hiranagar is a town and a notified area committee, near Kathua city in Kathua district in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is a tehsil headquarters.
Chack Diyalla or Chakdyala is a village in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is located in Hiranagar tehsil of Kathua district.
Ghagwal is a town and Panchayat in Samba district in the Jammu division of the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. The town is located 15 kilometres from district headquarters Samba.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hiranagar Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hiranagar Fort is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hiranagar Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jammu Airport (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Jammu Tawi (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hiranagar Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hiranagar Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hiranagar Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Hiranagar Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hiranagar Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hiranagar, Chak Dayala, Ghagwal.
